title: Operator enrollment response (v1alpha1)
description: Hub response to a successful enrollment. TARGET-STATE contract. Returns identity + short-lived credential material; NO master credential is ever issued.

credential.description: Short-lived credential the Operator uses to authenticate. Approved transport identity (ADR-0002/ADR-0004) is per-instance mTLS with short-lived certificates and rotation; bearer_jwt is a fallback. Never a long-lived master key.

credential_ref.description: Reference/handle to fetch or materialize the credential; not the secret value itself.

mtls_identity.description: Per-instance mTLS identity bound to this Operator (e.g. 'spiffe://hub.nexusos.dev/instance/inst_...'). Non-secret identity string.

hub_public_key.description: Hub desired-state signing key the Operator pins to verify signatures offline. Ed25519 (KMS/HSM-held); NOT Sigstore/keyless — the control plane does not depend on a public transparency log.

trust_domain.description: Trust root this Hub key belongs to; matches the desired-state signature trust_domain.
